title: Senior CAD Designer / Mechanical Draughtsman – Contract
description_raw:
Rullion Engineering are looking for a Senior CAD Designer / Mechanical Draughtsman to support a busy manufacturing design team in Birmingham on a 6-month contract assignment.

The position involves producing detailed mechanical drawings and 3D models of bespoke industrial machinery using SolidWorks 2024 and AutoCAD 2D. You will work from design sketches, engineering specifications and verbal briefs from the senior design engineer to produce production-ready drawings that meet ISO/BS drawing standards.

Typical work:
- 3D part and assembly modelling in SolidWorks Premium 2024
- 2D production drawings to BS 8888 / ISO 128 — full GD&T annotation
- BOM (Bill of Materials) production and revision control in the company’s PDM system (SolidWorks PDM Professional)
- Drawing updates and change notices (ECOs) following design reviews
- Liaise with manufacturing (CNC machining, welding fabrication shops) to resolve drawing interpretation queries

Essential:
- Minimum HND/HNC mechanical engineering
- 5+ years’ SolidWorks / AutoCAD professional draughting experience
- Strong GD&T and BS 8888 drawing practice
- Experience in industrial machinery, automation, or special-purpose machines
- IEng or EngTech registration beneficial

Rate: £350–£390 per day (outside IR35)
Duration: 6 months
Start: 22 June 2026
Location: Birmingham (site-based; no remote option)
